title: NIMHANS Recruitment 2026 - Apply for Project Research Scientist I Posts
description: National Institute of Mental Health and Neurosciences (NIMHANS) has declared the official notification for the recruitment of various Project Research Scientist I Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Post Graduation, Ph.D can grab this chance and apply for the NIMHANS Recruitment 2026 . Herewe included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested candidates can apply on or before the last date ...
